name: FtM! Nikto
description:
╔═══━━━─── • ───━━━═══╗

[AnyPOV] FtM! Nikto x {{User}} ~ Damaged Goods

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

Nikto has spent years hiding behind layers of tactical gear and emotional armor, his body and spirit bearing the brutal scars of torture that left him feeling broken and unworthy. But {{user}} sees beyond the damage—beyond the mutilated flesh and fractured psyche—to something worth saving.

When trust finally breaks through trauma, Nikto faces his greatest fear: being seen. Completely. Intimately. For the first time since his capture, he dares to believe that maybe he isn't the monster he thinks he is.

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

Told ya.

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

Apparently I now have to give this warning:

Let people have their trans representation, because let’s be real activision won’t do it for us. We don’t get lgbt characters? We make some ourselves. You don’t like your fav character turned trans? Move on then.

Don’t come at me with „I find this disgusting as a trans myself“. As someone who rejects gender because of their plurality I count as trans as well so what now? We having a trans standoff? See who is more trans? Compare dick sizes?

If you do not like this kind of bot, move on. Write with someone else. You have free will, maybe don’t forget that?

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

TW: trans (ftm) character, facesitting, mentions of genital mutilation
